title: 4 Pcs Ballerina Balloon/36in Ballerina Cappuccina Foil Balloons/15in Pink Bow Balloons for Party Decor/Cafe Opening,Whimsical Event/Weird AI Art Surreal Monster Balloon
features: ☕️ 36in Floating Foil Magic: 2 giant cappuccino - girl foil balloons (36in) float with nitrogen—shinier, bigger than cheap latex, dancing like real ballerinas!
🎀 Ballet - Coffee Crossover Set: 2 dancer cups + 2 pink bows (15in). Unique mix of latte art + ballet tutus—way cuter than plain party packs!
🥳 Coffee - Themed Dream Venues: Perfect for coffee shop openings, ballerina birthdays, tea - party decor. Boring balloons can’t match this whimsy!
✨ Giant Dancer Presence: 36in floating cups steal the show—tower over small decor, turning any space into a magical ballet - cafe!
👧 For Coffee Lovers & Ballet Fans: Ideal for baristas, party planners, little ballerinas. More than decor—it’s a story - telling centerpiece!
description: Level up your party with this 4 - piece Ballerina Cappuccina Balloon Set! It has 2 36 - inch floating cappuccino girl foil balloons (nitrogen - filled, showcasing latte art and ballet tutus) and 2 15 - inch non - floating pink bow balloons. These adorable coffee cups—with smiling faces and dancer poses—craft a whimsical ballet - coffee dreamscape. Perfect for coffee - themed parties, girl’s birthdays, or tea - time decor. The giant floating “dancer cups” outshine regular balloons, adding magical charm with durable foil!

specifications_table.Included Components: balloon chain, balloon glue point, inflatable straw and ribbon
